title: ConversationEvent
description: Event published by the ingress webhook and consumed by the agent worker, partitioned by tenant_id.

tenant_id.description: Identifies the B2B tenant. Used as the Redpanda partition key to preserve per-tenant ordering.

message_id.description: Unique identifier of the inbound WhatsApp message, used for idempotency.

occurred_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp of when the source message was received.

payload.description: Opaque message payload (e.g. the WhatsApp message body). Schema of the payload itself is not constrained at this contract level.

trace_id.description: Distributed tracing context propagated from the ingress webhook through to the agent worker.
